All right, welcome back. So this one's gonna be short and then we're going to actually build These two phase one campaigns here. So like I said earlier It doesn't matter if you're a grizzled vet if you built a million Facebook campaigns This is always going to be your phase one strategy for launching a new campaign even if it's a new campaign for something you've been selling before just Trust me on this one. All right. So what we're doing in a nutshell Okay, is we're just in this particular phase one thing now Remember there's a million ways to do Facebook ads, but right now this is phase one So what we're doing in phase one is we're taking a super simple ad like I showed you early Earlier and it's gonna have totally obvious copy So we're just gonna make like a really really basic ad that's like click this if you want to buy my stuff that obvious And then we're gonna set up one campaign that shows that super simple ad To a bunch of different audiences that may or may not have good targeting and we're gonna hope they have good targeting But we don't really know how good Facebook's targeting is if it says these people are interested in Brendan Bershard or whatever We don't really know if they actually are so that's why I say probably good. So that's why we're not gonna overthink that We're just gonna say, alright, you know, let's just see what happens Let's just choose some audiences and who knows maybe some will be good And we're gonna use a small daily budget for each audience and I like five bucks per audience That seems to make the algorithm work harder and in doing all of this we're gonna minimize our risk All right, so that's campaign number one campaign number two is we're gonna take the same strategy We're just gonna set up another campaign. That's gonna show that same totally basic ad to a few different audiences with very broad Targeting and it's also gonna run small budgets to those audiences too and by very broad targeting I mean like show this to every single person in the United States above the age of 20 So this every person in the United Kingdom above the age of 20 like that broad All right, and the reason we're doing that is sometimes you get lucky and the ad starts working right away and Facebook's artificial intelligence and their machine learning can just find you customers and Those giant broad audiences are a lot cheaper to run traffic to so that's why we do two of these tests At the same time here now look the net effect of this is we're basically buying data So when you run this test, it's essentially like you spending a couple hundred bucks To hire the greatest Facebook consultant in history to go out and do a tremendous amount of market research for you and say okay Here are the audiences that definitely respond to what you're selling I mean, that's really what you're you're getting there And so I wouldn't really expect this within its first couple of days to be profitable as a matter of fact It's not so I'll talk about that in a minute But let me diagram this for you to really really drive it home So our first campaign right as you know way Facebook works you have your campaign and then within your campaign You have ad sets and all the ad set is as you're saying okay Here are the people that we want to show the ad to so the ad set level was where you determine your audience So we're just gonna choose an audience like everyone who likes Gary Vee or whatever and we're just gonna show them that super basic ad Right, this is gonna have a picture that we sort of randomly choose and we're gonna have a couple sentences that are literally like Click this if you want to buy socks, you know a really really simple Totally obvious stuff and then we're gonna take that same ad and we're gonna just show it to a different audience So in this case gonna be people who like Tony Robbins and we're gonna then like find people who like Brendan Bershard and show them the same ad and then we're gonna take people who like you know 15 other guys right so we're gonna do that like 20 times I don't want to draw 20 boxes. We see what says audience 20 and Like in a perfect world you would have 20 different audiences that you're testing in this one campaign And each one of them spending like 500 or 500 about five dollars a day per audience, right? So your total spend per day is like a hundred bucks for some people that's you know That's significant and some people that's like oh man, I wish I could test a higher budget don't right just if and by the way of a hundred bucks is too much for you than just Lower the amount of audiences you're testing. Okay, but we're only gonna be testing these for a couple days Right, so we're gonna take you know, everybody seeing the same ad so this is campaign number one We're literally just sort of you know doing a logical guess of like, okay These are probably people who would want to buy my thing and we're putting the most obvious ad copy ever in front of them Which is like hey click here if you want to buy this stuff and the reason we're doing that obvious ad copy again It's because of Facebook's algorithm and their machine learning if we have an ad that's so blatant and obvious Which is like click here if you want to buy premium dog food and a lot of people click it Facebook is gonna start showing it to more of the people like the ones who click it and more of the people like the ones who buy So we're really training the pixel now. That's campaign number one We're also gonna build a second campaign is gonna work exactly the same Here's the only difference the only difference is the audiences, right? So instead of saying like show this to everyone who likes Brendan Burchard or whatever We're literally gonna say show this to everybody in the United States or show this to everybody in the United Kingdom or show this to everybody in Canada or show this to everybody in Australia and What are we gonna show them? Literally the same ad every single time So we're just taking those like super broad audiences because again like I said several times I'm sorry to be so redundant It's cheaper to do it that way and sometimes it just takes off like you never know Sometimes these damn things will just work right out of the gate with zero targeting is the craziest thing ever and when that happens You're like whoa, okay, this is great You know and so you got a pretty good chance that'll happen and the more ads you run the better your chances Are of that happening? So that's that's the big diagram when we're about to build those now The real reason I made this video for you is I want to tell you what not to do Okay, so I've taught this stuff now from level one I've taught a lot of this level one stuff everything else you're about to see I haven't ever really talked much of but in this level one thing People can totally drive themselves crazy if they do the things I'm about to tell you not to do So number one do not pay attention to the campaign as a whole We're testing audiences here. So you want to pay attention to the audiences? Let me give you an example Alright, let's take a look at this slide right here Hopefully you can still see my mouse we can Okay, so we're looking is my mouse still here. No, all right, so I'm sorry. All right So let's say, you know, let's just make this easier and let's say we're spending we've only got four audiences instead of 20 right, so we have four boxes here and Let's say each one spending a hundred bucks a day You know, so that's $400 a day per audience just as a hypothetical example and let's say you're selling something for 50 bucks and Each one of these ads is driving someone straight to a sales page of the sells the thing for 50 bucks So, you know, we're spending a $400 a day and we're selling a thing for $50 and let's say on You know after the end of two days or whatever this audience We've spent $200 and we've gotten 10 sales All right, and let's say on this audience We've spent $200 and we've gotten four sales and on this audience We've spent $200 and we've gotten no sales and on this audience We spent $200 and we've gotten no sales. So we've spent like $800 in total and we've had 12 sales. All right, and so that's like Technically speaking, we're losing money on the campaign as a whole, but you don't need to look at it that way Right instead you need to be like holy crap. We spent 200 bucks on this one and we got 12 sales We're making a profit right out of the gate. This one is breaking even this is perfect. These two we can just turn off Right. So if you look at it at the audience level You can see where your stuff is working if you look at it at the campaign level in this phase one You're gonna drive yourself crazy. The campaign as a whole is not supposed to be profitable Most of these audiences will not be profitable. They won't work Right. We're just looking to find the few of them that will that's why we only run this test for a couple of days Okay, now let me get back to it here. Okay, so that's thing number one All right So I can't tell you how many times I've had to talk people off the ledge because I'm like, oh my god I'm spending $100 per sale and I look at it. They've got like four, you know, let's say they're selling something for 50 bucks And they've got four audiences where they're getting a $50 sale for $10, you know But all the other audiences don't work and they just aren't paying attention to the good stuff They're only paying attention to the bad stuff. So again, the ones that don't work. They're not really Supposed to work you want them to but at the end of the day, we're just buying data in this quick test All right, so this thing number one thing number two do not expect this to be immediately profitable All right, so all we're doing is we're just finding audiences that buy your stuff Right now. Okay. Now some ad sets might be immediately profitable. What the expenditure overall Let's say over the next three days. You spend $300. I wouldn't expect to make six Like it's theoretically possible, but I wouldn't expect it to I'd expect to make a hundred bucks or whatever You know and you like you're some of the audiences work But most of them I would not expect to work and that again is totally cool. All right I also and this is one that'll kill you Do not under any circumstances extrapolate Long-term scenarios from one day is worth of data All right, so I'm filming this for you middle of the afternoon on the 16th of August and so here are today's stats Right so overall like fair but not really because this revenue you're seeing right here These are actually people who bought stuff after clicking on ad campaigns that are no longer running So these are people who are buying stuff on the back end So if I look like here's a campaign for example This is an experimental campaign where I'm literally showing it to those giant audiences I told you about and this one is lost 69 bucks for today and let's see here's another one that's down like $79 for today. All right, here's another one that's down like a hundred forty dollars for today So if I were to look at these I would be like man, you know if I add all this stuff up I'm down like 300 bucks for today now my brain Can easily be like oh my gosh if I keep going at this rate. I'm gonna lose $10,000 a month I got to turn all my ads off well You never ever want to do that because in reality if I look at these, you know It's like I've gotten eight or nine hundred clicks. That's great Now, you know a lot of the revenue in this in these funnels are made from the upsells and look I've gotten like a total of 50 no not even that much if I were to add all of this stuff Yeah, maybe maybe 50 total unique front-end sales So it's just a matter of like not that many people are buying the upsells today But our brain can easily take a situation like this and be like oh my gosh it didn't work today I got to change everything or I can do the opposite which is I can have a day like Gosh one of these days. I forgot when it was sometime last week did ridiculously well not last week last month I think it was a 28th. Let's see if that was right I'll show you the opposite of this and then I'll show you why it's all irrelevant here But yeah, like so on this one look I've made three grand in net profit from the ads and a lot of it was the same Same ad sets like this one like the same one the same campaign right that big big audience test I think made three thousand dollars in net profit that day, but it's lost 68 today So, you know on this particular day, I could have been like well, this means I'm done. I'm retired I'm gonna I'm gonna make three thousand dollars a day doing nothing. All right Let's drink the champagne and you know go out and max out our credit cards No, like you don't want to react at all to a very small amount of data other than my saying oh cool Or oh man, but like never get too excited because in reality what you want to do is you always want to look at this stuff and like seven-day increments, you know and and and like shortest increments maybe three days, so let's just have a look at 9th through the 16th so you can see and some of these campaigns I do need to edit and I'm literally have like done nothing to them so far So I could film myself working on them for this very training So you can see what to do when things aren't going as planned. So this guy like he's been a little bit flaky This one, you know over the past seven days. It's lost a hundred eighty dollars. So and I don't know, you know Well, maybe I should mess around with that one. That was not so good This one Has crushed it like so this one's been making a pretty good bit of money today. It's down 60 something dollars But in general, it's like 2400 bucks the past seven days damn near twice You know and two dollars back for every dollar I put in there So you get it right so the reason I'm telling you this is because if you get with us or if you get with an instructor or whatever You know, okay, I spent $50 and I got 32 clicks and this is all that happened We're gonna be really nice to you But at the end of the day the answers you're gonna you're gonna get is gonna be like Did quit being a wuss and freaking let some traffic hit the thing so we can get enough data to actually draw any logical Conclusions, you know, so that's why I'm showing that to you, right? I never just take a tiny little snapshot and draw forever Conclusion, okay, so let me get back to my slides here And here we go I want to give you some more warnings before we build these campaigns because I don't want you to be unhappy You know number number four here is don't over complicate this like Is it possible to do dynamic creative where you split test ten different images and ten different headlines and different Ten different pieces of body copy. Yes, is it possible to use? You know one ads video ad and one ads an image ad. Yes, can you split test two different ads against each other? Yes, you can do all of that kind of stuff. Are we? Yes, just not in this stage Okay, so in this stage even if you're a veteran doesn't matter. All right in this particular stage Please follow the instructions to the gosh dang letter It's really really simple what we're about to do our brains because you and I are entrepreneurs our brains like to create You know, they're like, no, let me do like something cool. Don't do anything cool yet You know the cool thing is just build the campaign and see what happens and a couple audiences work We're stoked and if none of them work, that's fine. We'll just do another test, right? But don't over complicate it Okay, and don't check your results ten times a day, right? So if you check your results ten times a day, you're gonna like let's say you check it You know literally every two hours and you wake up at seven in the morning You check it at seven you check it at nine you check it at eleven you take it at one you check it at three You check it at five you check it at seven at night And then you check it at nine o'clock at night and then you wait again till the next day What's gonna happen is you're gonna be like yay boo. Yay boo like you know It's gonna be great and then it's not gonna be great and there's gonna be great And it's not gonna be great and the fact of the matter is that you really need to look at this stuff over time Right and so if you want to check your stats like a million times a day Go ahead and do it, but don't let it influence any of your decisions Okay, and do not deviate from this strategy. All right So this phase one strategy just follow this strategy to the letter. Can we use CBO instead of the Billy of the bidding method? We're going to yes, can we use you know the row has objective instead of max conversions? Yes Can we use cost cap? Yes, we can't and we will but not in this phase. All right if we deviate from this strategy We're gonna spend more money We're gonna risk more money and potentially lose more money up front Then you want to and half of the this game is not losing money, you know, and so we don't want to do that and finally Do not go into this without a clear idea of what you're willing to pay per customer All right, so I'm gonna demonstrate this in our next video I'm gonna build these two tests on and I'm gonna use my four dollar thing Right now at the end of the day already know my customers are worth within first 30 days 34 dollars All right, so I'm willing to pay like hell if I 27 bucks to get one. I don't care So if I've got some ad sets where you know, I'm getting customers But nobody's buying the upstells by but I still got like five or six customers for ten dollars each If I know they're statistically worth 30 or actually what 34 dollars over the next 30 days Then I'm not gonna get freaked out over the fact that they haven't bought the upsells yet I'm like, okay. I'm getting them for less than than what I'm willing to get them for this is good So if you don't know if you don't have like your numbers dialed in like I do then just guess just be like, okay This is what I'm willing to pay and then bait based all of your future decisions off of what you're willing to pay And as opposed to whether or not they bought upsells or whatever, right? So know your KPIs going into this thing. All right, so that's like kind of the big hopefully You watch this and it therefore saves you potential Aggravation right so I wouldn't call these warnings because like if you do these things nothing bad is gonna happen Other than you're gonna drive yourself crazy, but that's the big overview and these are the things to avoid so you don't drive yourself nuts We're basically gonna set this up We're gonna walk away from it for a couple days And then we're gonna check it and fix it and tweak it and make it cooler and move on to stage two cool. All right So that's the end of this video. I'll see you the next one. Let's build this campaign
